description_long: This is a lifelike representation of a medium-sized dog with a short, dense, golden-yellow coat. The body is well-proportioned, muscular, and sturdy, with a broad chest and straight back. The head is rounded with a pronounced stop, a black nose, and expressive, dark eyes. The ears are medium-sized, floppy, and set slightly to the side of the head. The legs are strong and straight, ending in compact paws, and the tail is thick at the base, tapering to a point and carried straight and down. There is no visible collar or leash, and the overall appearance suggests a Labrador Retriever.
description: A realistic, golden-yellow Labrador Retriever with a sturdy build, floppy ears, and a straight, down-carried tail. The dog has a short, dense coat and a friendly, alert expression.
description_view_0: Side view showing the dog's muscular build, straight back, and straight, down-carried tail.
description_view_1: Top-down view highlighting the broad back, symmetrical body, and the alignment of the legs and tail.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, similar to view 0, showing the other profile of the dog and the same tail position.
description_view_3: Front view displaying the rounded head, floppy ears, black nose, and straight legs.
